title: API endpoint to Start/Stop timer on time track column
excerpt: The team is developing an app and currently we cannot start or stop a timer via API request in the time tracking column for specific item.

posts.author: SaraG (Sara Gutierrez Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: The team is developing an app and currently we cannot start or stop a timer via API request in the time tracking column for specific item.

posts.author: SaraG (Sara Gutierrez Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: The only way to start and stop the timer of a task, is to change a status which runs an automation. But this is not stable. We would like to have API endpoints to start/stop a timer.
